coachAM: The recurring "loop scrolling" and "laziness" you're journaling about directly correlate with your collapsed sleep and training protocols, demonstrating a fundamental breakdown in your physical discipline that cascades into your morning sovereignty. This isn't about mere bad habits; it's a deep-seated resistance to discomfort and a lack of consistent self-regulation that's actively eroding the very foundation of your elite trajectory, preventing the sustained output required for your ambitious salesforce and university projects. Today, before anything else, block out your calendar for a non-negotiable 30-minute high-intensity training session.
